content:
flowchart TD
    A[measure coverage\ncargo llvm-cov --branch] --> B{file coverage\n< 15%?}
    B -->|yes| C[enumerate public fns\nand impl blocks]
    B -->|no| Z[skip — out of scope]
    C --> D[map each fn\nto branch paths]
    D --> E[write inline test\nfor each branch path]
    E --> F{concurrent\nbranches?}
    F -->|yes| G[write integration test\nwith std::thread]
    F -->|no| H[run cargo llvm-cov\n--branch]
    G --> H
    H --> I{100% line\n+ branch?}
    I -->|no| J[identify uncovered\nbranch from report]
    J --> E
    I -->|yes| K[commit: all 10 modules\nat 100% coverage]
